description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named equinox_build:debian that uses the debian:latest image, runs before_script "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libcppunit-dev cmake pkg-config build-essential libconfig++-dev valgrind libeigen3-dev doxygen", then script "mkdir -p build", "cd build", "cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo ..", "make", "cd ..", and stores the build/ directory as an artifact. Also add a job named equinox_build:opensuse that uses the opensuse/tumbleweed image, runs before_script "zypper ref && zypper install -y -l gcc-c++ cppunit-devel cmake pkg-config libconfig++-devel valgrind eigen3-devel doxygen patterns-devel-C-C++-devel_C_C++", then the same script steps, and archives build/ as an artifact. In the test stage add a job equinox_test:debian that depends on equinox_build:debian, uses debian:latest, runs the same before_script as the debian build, then script "cd build" and "make CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 test". Also add a job equinox_test:opensuse that depends on equinox_build:opensuse, uses opensuse/tumbleweed, runs the same before_script as the opensuse build, then script "cd build" and "make CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 test".
